result.summary: The page is generally recognizable, but several elements appear clipped or obscured, suggesting horizontal overflow and insufficient spacing around fixed UI elements.

issues.description: Content appears to overflow horizontally. The right side of the category tabs and multiple game cards are cut off, including the 'Hot Games' tab and the third column of game tiles.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive layout for this viewport. Use fewer columns, reduce card widths, or implement a clearly intentional horizontal carousel with proper padding and snap behavior.

issues.description: The sticky bottom navigation overlaps the game content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering the last visible row of game cards.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the scrollable content equal to the height of the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: The hero carousel right arrow is partially clipped at the edge of the screen, making it look broken and potentially reducing the tappable area.
issues.suggestion: Move carousel controls inward or add horizontal padding so the arrows are fully visible and easy to tap.

issues.description: The top category tab row looks abruptly cut off on the right with no clear indication that it can be horizontally scrolled.
issues.suggestion: Add fade indicators, scroll snapping, or ensure the active set of tabs fits within the viewport with consistent side padding.
